headline: Molson Coors Beverage Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) executives said the company is moving quickly on its newly announced “Horizon 2030” strategy while reaffirming full-year 2026 guidance, even as input-cost inflation and macro uncertainty continue to weigh on consumers and operations.
